attacking_style: Primarily attacks in early breakaways to secure KOM points or stage wins, often going solo at race start. In breakaway finishes, holds power reserve until final 100-300m, showing superior tactical patience over premature attackers.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on domestique leadouts in breakaway sprints (CRADDOCK, GREGAARD, VALGREN providing blocking/tempo). Team often sacrifices own opportunities to position him. Functions autonomously in early KOM attacks without team support.
terrain_preference: Excels on rolling/transition stages with reduced bunch sprints and breakaway finishes. Strong on technical circuits and moderate climbs. Exposed on sustained steep gradients (20%+ ramps) and pure climber selections despite puncheur characteristics.
vulnerability: Dropped immediately on sustained mountain climbs even when holding GC (Paris-Nice yellow). Caught out by crosswind positioning errors. Fades on extreme gradients and technical descents in ITTs. Cannot sustain GC ambitions beyond TTT/breakaway stage wins.
key_patterns: Attacks solo at race start for uncontested KOM points, preempting breakaway competition (4+ instances)
Wins breakaway sprints by conserving energy behind premature attacks in final 300-1500m (5+ instances)
Multiple stage wins per Grand Tour via breakaway mastery: 3 Vuelta 2021, trilogy complete 2023
Exceptional leadout reliance: CRADDOCK/GREGAARD drove entire final kilometers before delivering sprint (3+ instances)
Converts reduced bunch sprints reliably but avoids pure field gallops, selective stage targeting pattern
Strong ITT ability on flat/rolling terrain but fades on technical descents and climbing TTs
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Giro stage win completed Grand Tour trilogy. Survived blocking tactics and shown tactical maturity, though climbing weakness persists on sustained gradients.
